description_long: This is a Toshiba television remote control, featuring a rectangular, slightly curved body made of black plastic. The top surface is populated with a variety of physical buttons, including a numeric keypad, colored function buttons, navigation arrows, and a prominent 'OK' button at the center. The buttons are raised and clearly labeled, with white numbers and symbols for easy visibility. The lower section of the remote displays the Toshiba brand name, and the colored buttons (red, green, yellow, blue) are positioned just above it. The remote is compact and lightweight, designed to fit comfortably in one hand, and is likely powered by batteries accessible from the back. Its overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for everyday use in home or public urban environments.
description: A black Toshiba TV remote control with a full set of physical buttons, including a numeric keypad and colored function keys, designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile and the raised buttons along the top surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full button layout, including the numeric keypad and central navigation cluster.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and button arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear angled view with the Toshiba logo visible and the colored function buttons prominent near the bottom.
